q: How do I book a flight with Shadman Travels?
a: Use the flight search form at the top of this page to submit your travel details, or simply call or WhatsApp us at +92 300 0041510. Our team will get back to you with an exclusive fare quote, usually within minutes during business hours.

q: Is Shadman Travels a licensed travel agency?
a: Yes. We're a government-licensed travel agency (License #3322) and an IATA-recognized agent, meaning every ticket we issue goes through proper, accountable channels.

q: Does submitting an enquiry mean my flight is booked?
a: Not yet — submitting an enquiry gets you a fare quote, not a confirmed booking. A booking is only confirmed once payment is received and we issue confirmation. Fares can change until then, as they're subject to airline availability.

q: How do I pay for my booking?
a: Our team will explain accepted payment methods directly with you at the time of booking, once your fare and itinerary are confirmed.

q: Can I change or cancel my booking after it's confirmed?
a: Changes and cancellations are subject to the fare rules of the specific airline you're booked with, which vary widely. Contact us as early as possible — we'll explain your options and any applicable fees.

q: Do you help with Umrah and Hajj packages?
a: Yes, Umrah and Hajj packages are one of our specialties. Pricing and availability are seasonal, so reach out directly for current package details and accommodation options.

q: Can you help with visa requirements too?
a: We offer visa assistance as part of our services. Final approval always rests with the relevant embassy or consulate, but our team can guide you through the requirements for your destination.

q: What if I need to book for multiple passengers, including children or infants?
a: No problem — our booking form supports up to 9 passengers per enquiry across adults, children (2–11 years), and infants (under 2). Just add their details when you submit your search.

q: How fast will I hear back after submitting an enquiry?
a: Our team typically responds within minutes during business hours. For urgent same-day travel, calling or WhatsApping us directly at +92 300 0041510 is the fastest way to reach us.

q: Do you only handle international flights, or domestic too?
a: Both. We book domestic routes within Pakistan as well as international flights to the Middle East, Europe, the UK, North America, and Asia-Pacific across our 15+ airline partners.
